properties.name: AppLayout
properties.description: Sidebar + Header + Content Area. RBAC-filtered navigation.

properties.name: Sidebar
properties.description: Navigation menu filtered by role (teacher/student) and enrollment status (active/expired)

properties.name: Header
properties.description: Logo, breadcrumbs, group switcher (students), user menu

properties.name: GroupSwitcher
properties.description: Dropdown in header for students to switch between enrolled groups (active highlighted, expired grayed)

properties.name: RegisterForm
properties.description: Email + password + name + promo code, used in UC-002

properties.name: ChangePasswordForm
properties.description: Current + new password, used in UC-005/UC-006

properties.name: DataTable
properties.description: Generic table with search, filters, pagination, sorting. Used across: student list, lectures, grades, generations

properties.name: GradesMatrix
properties.description: Specialized matrix: students x lectures for teacher. Used in UC-407

properties.name: MarkdownEditor
properties.description: Textarea with markdown preview. Used in course/lecture descriptions, HW descriptions
